creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Free hidden gem in Copenhagen ⭐️👇  📍Mærsk Tårnet 

Mærsk Tårnet is part of Copenhagen University, but it’s open to the public and free to enter from 8 to 17 every weekday✌️  My advice? Get the metro to Nørrebros Runddel, walk down along Nørrebrogade, and check out the cosy cafés, bars and restaurants in Elmegade, Fælledvej and Ravnsborggade before heading over to the tower.   Afterwards, you can stroll along the Lakes over to the city centre or stay in Nørrebro, which in my opinion is one of the most interesting parts of Copenhagen 🫡   #copenhagen #copenhagenlife #denmarktravel

transcription.text: Last time I shared a cool hidden gem in Copenhagen a few locals got really annoyed so here's another one. You're going to locate this building which is a part of the Copenhagen University but it's open to the general public and it's also free to enter so if that doesn't get your juices flowing I don't know what will. Head in, get the lift up to the 15th floor and here you'll find a lovely view of the lakes and the city center of Copenhagen. Follow for more hidden gems.
